name: turboquant-wasm
description: TurboQuant WASM SIMD vector compression — 3 bits/dim with fast dot product. Requires relaxed SIMD (Chrome 114+, Firefox 128+, Safari 18+, Node 20+)

scripts.build:zig: mkdir -p dist && zig build-exe -target wasm32-freestanding -mcpu=generic+simd128+relaxed_simd -O ReleaseSmall src/wasm_exports.zig --name turboquant -fno-entry -rdynamic && mv turboquant.wasm dist/
scripts.build:js: bun build src/js/index.ts src/js/gpu-index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external && bun run build:types
scripts.build: bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:embed && bun run build:js

author: Steven Chong
